        item - to serialize
        Returns:
        Base64 string of the item

        items - to serialize
        Returns:
        Base64 string of the items

      • itemStackFromBase64

        public static org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack itemStackFromBase64(String data)
        Gets a single ItemStack from Base64 string.
        Parameters:
        data - Base64 string of the item
        Returns:
        ItemStack created from the Base64 string

      • itemStacksFromBase64

        public static org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack[] itemStacksFromBase64(String data)
        Gets an array of ItemStacks from Base64 string.
        Parameters:
        data - Base64 string of the items
        Returns:
        Array of ItemStacks created from the Base64 string
